movie.actors: Sandra Bullock, Jason Patric, Willem Dafoe, Temuera Morrison
movie.plot: A computer hacker breaks into the computer system of the Seabourn Legend cruise liner and sets it speeding on a collision course into a gigantic oil tanker.
movie.title: Speed 2: Cruise Control
movie.writer: Graham Yost (characters), Jan de Bont (story), Randall McCormick (story), Randall McCormick (screenplay), Jeff Nathanson (screenplay)
